title: Loop Engineering Audit Checklist
description: Machine-readable audit for loops/<name>/. Use in CI, PR bots, or scripts/loop-audit.py.

checks.summary: Loop solves a recurring task, not a one-off
checks.verify: README states recurrence frequency and cost of manual repetition.
checks.pass_if: Recurrence documented with estimated manual cost per occurrence.

checks.summary: Decision framework applied: loop is justified vs one-shot prompt
checks.verify: README or config references why a loop beats a single agent call.
checks.pass_if: Explicit comparison to one-shot alternative exists.

checks.summary: Owner and journey_stage set in config.yaml
checks.verify: config.yaml contains owner and journey_stage fields.
checks.pass_if: Both fields present and non-empty.

checks.summary: Success criteria stated as testable statement
checks.verify: config.success_criteria.statement is one evaluable sentence.
checks.pass_if: Statement contains measurable outcome, not vibes.

checks.verify: config.success_criteria.tier is 1–5; README explains tier choice.
checks.pass_if: Tier ≤ 3 OR human_gate documented for Tier 4–5.

checks.summary: At least one metric with type and target
checks.verify: config.success_criteria.metrics array has id, type, target.
checks.pass_if: metrics.length >= 1 and verifier.py implements each metric.

checks.summary: verifier.py exists and returns structured result
checks.verify: Run verifier.py --dry-run; output includes pass, score, metrics.
checks.pass_if: Exit code 0 on fixture pass; JSON or key=value stdout.

checks.verify: Grep skill.md and README for subjective-only gates.
checks.pass_if: No sole criterion is unmeasured adjectives.

checks.verify: config.phases.state.attempts_path points to state/attempts.jsonl.
checks.pass_if: Path exists in config; state/ directory present.

checks.verify: skill.md or agentic doc instructs append of timestamp, metrics, diff summary.
checks.pass_if: Attempt schema documented in README or TEMPLATE.

checks.summary: Next run reads prior attempts before generating
checks.verify: skill.md step 1 loads last N attempts or best attempt.
checks.pass_if: Explicit 'read state first' instruction in skill.

checks.verify: .gitignore excludes attempts.jsonl; state/.gitkeep committed.
checks.pass_if: Runtime state not committed; folder scaffold is.

checks.verify: config.phases.trigger.type set and wired or documented as TODO with owner.
checks.pass_if: Automated trigger OR explicit manual-only with journey_stage=manual|skill.

checks.verify: skill.md single responsibility; no unrelated tasks.
checks.pass_if: Skill scope matches loop name and success criteria.

checks.summary: Model tier and turn budget set
checks.verify: config.phases.execution.model_tier and max_turns_per_iteration present.
checks.pass_if: Both fields set or budget.max_tokens_per_iteration set.

checks.verify: config.stop_conditions.max_iterations >= 1.
checks.pass_if: Cap present; skill mentions stopping at cap.

checks.verify: max_cost_usd or max_duration_minutes set for automate/self_improve loops.
checks.pass_if: At least one ceiling OR journey_stage is manual/skill only.

checks.verify: config.stop_conditions.on_success is stop|continue_improve|open_pr.
checks.pass_if: Field present.

checks.summary: Loop README explains how to run manually
checks.verify: README has Prerequisites, Run, Verify sections.
checks.pass_if: Copy-paste commands for manual iteration.

checks.verify: python3 scripts/loop-audit.py or schema validator passes.
checks.pass_if: Schema validation succeeds.

checks.summary: Anti-patterns section or link to implementation guide
checks.verify: README links to docs/loop-engineering/implementation-guide.md.
checks.pass_if: Link present.

checks.verify: manual=human runs; skill=skill only; automate=trigger wired; self_improve=state fed back.
checks.pass_if: No automate/self_improve without verifier and state.

checks.verify: skill.md exists before full automation docs.
checks.pass_if: skill.md present and referenced by execution phase.

checks.verify: README lists next journey stage upgrade steps.
checks.pass_if: Upgrade path from current journey_stage documented.
